title: Ethmane
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ethmane''' was a dense gas found on [[Kr]] in the form of frozen ice jungles. It also vaporized into the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]] of the moon.

It could block [[scanner]]s or [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]], and thus became a problem for any flying among the ice structures on Kr.

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King (abridged audiobook)|''Dark Nest I: The Joiner King'' abridged audiobook]]

==Sources==
